{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113355678451B82931278564D6B"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611412782585119512","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"清朝原来是女真人"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772172869,"group_id":"7610989929153170457","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一袭白衣，始于初见。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+ImS/JSDVBUbI0WQX0ZxRc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/921f034d87304a388143c1dbf26c5017~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621525&x-signature=BhE9OYWOic3DMoSnU7bnv0huJZQ%3D","user_id":"80713633242","user_name":"末枕"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"80713633242","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7610989929153170457","book_info":{"abstract":"全书按清朝帝王统治时序分册，每册聚焦1-2位核心帝王，以开国奠基—盛世治理—中衰转折—末世倾覆为脉络，划分四大部分：
第一部分：开国奠基卷（1616-1661）
本册为开篇，涵盖清太祖努尔哈赤、清太宗皇太极、清世祖福临三位帝王，讲述清朝从女真部落统一、建立后金/大清，到入关定鼎、确立全国统治的关键历程，即本册核心内容。
第二部分：康乾盛世卷（1661-1796）
聚焦康熙、雍正、乾隆三帝，写除鳌拜、平三藩、收台湾、征准噶尔、改土归流、闭关锁国等，梳理盛世巅峰与潜藏危机。
第三部分：中衰转折卷（1796-1840）
以嘉庆、道光前期为核心，写白莲教起义、吏治腐败、鸦片流入、国力衰退，清朝由盛转衰的关键节点。
第四部分：末世倾覆卷（1840-1912）
涵盖鸦片战争至清帝退位，写列强入侵、太平天国运动、洋务运动、戊戌变法、清末新政、辛亥革命，封建王朝的终结。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/abc501a96f6f92965dea4385aad361c0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"末枕","author_id":"","book_id":"7610989929153170457","book_name":"清朝这些事儿","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b86830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":126,"name":"明朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=126&name=明朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":497,"name":"武将","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=497&name=武将&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":871,"name":"第一人称","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871&name=第一人称&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":503,"name":"清朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=503&name=清朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7610991864254038553","read_count":"40","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"163740"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"43","tags":"历史古代,历史,武将,明朝,第一人称,清朝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/abc501a96f6f92965dea4385aad361c0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255356&x-signature=iJSVvWYtrpDLRJyIpXK3uFupSd0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"80713633242","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"0"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113355678451B82931278564D6B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":1,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7610989929153170457","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count":"","tags":"","thumb_url":"","tomato_book_status":""},"filter_tag":[],"hot_word_search":[],"score_cnt":1,"score_text":"1人点评"}},"debug_info":"","log_id":"2026032113355678451B82931278564D6B","message":"请求成功"}
